div1.entryFree: Intergatory (M. Edd. inter'gatory), interrogatory, a question asked upon oath: charge us upon --ies, Merch. V, 298. the first i. that my Nerissa shall be sworn on, Merch. V, 298 let me answer to the particular of the --ies, All's IV, 3, 207. In Cymb. V, 5, 392 O. Edd. interrogatories, some M. Edd. intergatories.
